summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Audix scanner mobile app focusing on master data persistence fixes. All critical functionality working correctly on mobile viewport.
passed_tests: Mobile app loads correctly on 375x812 viewport
Login functionality works with admin/admin123 credentials
Bottom navigation bar displays Master, Scan, Reports, Settings tabs
Master Data page loads with Products and Locations tabs
8 master products visible with barcodes and pricing data
4 master locations visible in Locations tab
Reports page loads showing location and item count information
Navigation between all main sections (Reports, Scan, Master, Settings) working
No data loss warning banner detected - persistence fixes working
No JavaScript console errors or crashes detected
IndexedDB initialization completed successfully with mock data
